categories.name: Mathematics Sequence
categories.description: Choose one mathematics sequence: AM (Engineering Math Methods I, II, Multivariate Calculus for Engineers) or MATH (Linear Algebra, Differential Equations, Vector Calculus).

categories.name: Physics: Mechanics
categories.description: Choose one mechanics physics course with lab.

categories.name: Physics: Electricity & Magnetism
categories.description: Choose one electricity and magnetism physics course with lab.

categories.name: Lower Division Core
categories.description: Required lower-division programming and computer systems courses.

categories.name: Lower Division Programming Choice
categories.description: Choose one systems programming course: Computer Systems and C Programming (CSE 13S) or Computer Systems and C Programming (ECE 13).

categories.name: Upper Division Core
categories.description: Required upper-division core courses: Introduction to Data Structures & Algorithms, and Introduction to Computer Networks.

categories.name: Disciplinary Communication (DC)
categories.description: Technical Writing for Computer Science and Engineering. Satisfies the DC requirement.

categories.name: Capstone
categories.description: Choose one capstone course. Your capstone cannot count for both a capstone and an elective.

categories.name: Upper Division Electives
categories.description: Choose 4 upper-division elective courses from the approved list. Capstone course cannot also count as an elective.
